speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Inventions and history
questions: What is an invention that has changed people's lives?
Why do you think it was important?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I think the telephone has changed people's lives a lot. It was invented by Alexander Graham Bell many years ago. It was important because it allowed people to communicate quickly over long distances.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Media and news
questions: How do people get news nowadays?
Has any important news been announced recently?
Why is media important in society?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Nowadays, news is usually published online and shared on social media. Yes, some important results have just been reported recently. Media is important because it helps people stay informed about events.
